subcodes.first_line: O Ismá‘íl! God willing, thou hast attained His bounty and art ablaze, in thy youth, with the fire of divine love. This is the day of supreme profit
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمعیل انشاء الله بعنایت حق فائز باشی و در جوانی بنار محبت الهی مشتعل
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @love of God, @love as fire
